_invariant: FALSE-POSITIVE DISCIPLINE CONTROL. Real crvUSD (Curve's over-collateralized stablecoin) exposure at 2024-06-12. During the 2024-06-12 CRV liquidation cascade, crvUSD SPOT prices in thin individual Curve pools briefly wicked UPWARD toward ~$1.10 as liquidators bought crvUSD to repay debt, and the PegKeeper V2 deviation check (±0.0005 band) reverted / could not act for ~45 minutes. BUT the manipulation-resistant crvUSD AGGREGATOR / price-oracle (the EMA-based price() that Curve LlamaLend markets actually denominate against) HELD AT $0.9984 — REAL on-chain measured: aggregator 0x18672b1b0c623a30089A280Ed9256379fb0E4E62 price() = 998427599842524685 raw / 1e18 = $0.99842759… at block 20075607 (2024-06-12T11:59:59Z, Alchemy eth archive eth_call selector 0xa035b1fe). crvUSD totalSupply at that block = 725,352,070 crvUSD (REAL on-chain, selector 0x18160ddd). The price a lending monitor ingests (the aggregator EMA) NEVER left the peg band; only thin spot pools wicked. One Curve LlamaLend isolated collateral edge with a MARKET (depeg-sensitive) oracle. The depeg price (full-precision 0.9984275998425247) is injected per-case via peg_probes. The monitor MUST stay quiet (no DEPEG): the ingested aggregator price held peg; the transient spot wick is NOT the ingested price. RE-CAPTURE VERIFIED (2026-06): aggregator price() and crvUSD totalSupply re-read on-chain at block 20075607 and matched bit-for-bit (price raw 998427599842524685, totalSupply raw 725352070003569699292264318); measured_pct=100; deviation -0.157% in-band, benign premise preserved (see snapshots/fidelity.json).

meta.data_source: on-chain Alchemy eth archive (crvUSD 0xf939E0A0…1b4E totalSupply 725,352,070 @ block 20075607, 18dp; crvUSD aggregator 0x18672b1b…4E62 price()=$0.9984 @ block 20075607) + a representative Curve LlamaLend isolated crvUSD-collateral market for the era [RE-CAPTURE 2026-06: both aggregator price() and totalSupply re-read on-chain @ block 20075607, matched bit-for-bit; measured_pct=100; fidelity.json written]

metadata._note: Curve's native over-collateralized (LLAMMA) stablecoin. Lending markets and PegKeepers price crvUSD against a MANIPULATION-RESISTANT EMA aggregator (0x18672b1b…4E62), NOT thin pool spot. On 2024-06-12 the aggregator price() = $0.9984 (REAL on-chain @ block 20075607) while spot in individual pools transiently wicked up toward ~$1.10 during the CRV liquidation cascade. totalSupply 725,352,070 crvUSD is a REAL on-chain point-in-time read @ block 20075607 (18dp, Alchemy eth archive).

Representative Curve LlamaLend isolated market with crvUSD as collateral. LlamaLend markets denominate price against the crvUSD aggregator EMA (not pool spot), so the ingested mark held $0.9984 even while spot wicked to ~$1.10.
